channel.title: Comments on: bb Attachments Plugin by _ck_ fixed for bbPress 1.0

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/bb-attachments-plugin-fixed/#comment-1550">Abdessamad IDRISSI</a>.
Oh.. sorry, it got hidden while changing the theme :-) Fixed now.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Abdessamad IDRISSI.

Oh.. sorry, it got hidden while changing the theme 🙂
Fixed now.

item.title: By: Abdessamad IDRISSI
item.dc:creator: Abdessamad IDRISSI
item.description:
thanks gautam,
where is the download link!?

item.title: By: KillerSneak
item.dc:creator: KillerSneak
item.description:
Hi, I'm still having the same issues as the original version
http://www.cell-systems.net/forums/topic/enzyme-11-beta/page/3
If you could take a look there if you have the time
â€¢ IDgcard.txt (0.2 KB, 17 downloads) 37 minutes old [x] â€¢ error_install_enzyme1.1beta2.txt (45.1 KB, 9 downloads) 37 minutes old [x]
I can not save any attachments to my desktop, and some attachments fail to opena t all. This issue was/is also presant in the _CK_ 0.27 version. I hope you can help me out with this as i really need such a plugin for my website and error reporting functionality (a screenshot tells more than a 28371209837 words :) )
Thanks in advance, Wandert "KillerSneak" van bruggen
item.content:encoded:
Hi, I’m still having the same issues as the original version

http://www.cell-systems.net/forums/topic/enzyme-11-beta/page/3

If you could take a look there if you have the time

â€¢ IDgcard.txt (0.2 KB, 17 downloads) 37 minutes old [x]
â€¢ error_install_enzyme1.1beta2.txt (45.1 KB, 9 downloads) 37 minutes old [x]

I can not save any attachments to my desktop, and some attachments fail to opena t all. This issue was/is also presant in the _CK_ 0.27 version. I hope you can help me out with this as i really need such a plugin for my website and error reporting functionality (a screenshot tells more than a 28371209837 words 🙂 )

Thanks in advance,
Wandert “KillerSneak” van bruggen

item.title: By: Anish K.S
item.dc:creator: Anish K.S
item.description: BB Press is simple, i have a bb forum.
item.content:encoded: BB Press is simple, i have a bb forum.
